#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Sovereign Defense Core — unified military defense doctrine for all digital twin layers.

Layers: PERIMETER, ISR, SIGINT, CYBER, NAV_C2, SPATIAL, COGNITIVE, KINETIC, AIR_DEFENSE
Posture: DEFCON 5 (peacetime) → DEFCON 1 (maximum readiness)

Keith Alan Dickey — WSDS / 04901 Studio
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import time
from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict, field
from enum import IntEnum
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

CONFIG = Path(__file__).resolve().parent / "config" / "defense_layers.json"
SHM_BUS = Path("/dev/shm/sovereign_defense.json")


class Defcon(IntEnum):
    PEACETIME = 5
    NORMAL = 4
    ELEVATED = 3
    HIGH = 2
    MAXIMUM = 1


DEFENSE_LAYERS = [
    {"id": "perimeter", "label": "PERIMETER", "domain": "network_boundary",
     "capabilities": ["tailscale_acl", "mesh_auth", "port_hardening", "air_gap"]},
    {"id": "isr", "label": "ISR", "domain": "intelligence_surveillance_reconnaissance",
     "capabilities": ["human_detect", "animal_detect", "thermal_lwir", "eo_ir", "gmti", "building_paint"]},
    {"id": "sigint", "label": "SIGINT", "domain": "signals_intelligence",
     "capabilities": ["rf_comint", "rtl_sdr", "phonon_bridge", "doppler", "through_wall"]},
    {"id": "cyber", "label": "CYBER", "domain": "cyber_defense",
     "capabilities": ["cve_monitor", "bounty_dossier", "attack_surface", "hardening_playbook"]},
    {"id": "nav_c2", "label": "NAV/C2", "domain": "command_control",
     "capabilities": ["gns_jump", "ephemeris", "gnss_pnt", "mesh_registry", "tactical_ai"]},
    {"id": "spatial", "label": "SPATIAL", "domain": "digital_twin_geometry",
     "capabilities": ["lattice_obj", "point_cloud", "5d_loom", "phonon_spikes"]},
    {"id": "cognitive", "label": "COGNITIVE", "domain": "ai_reasoning",
     "capabilities": ["ollama_local", "rag_chroma", "snn_genesis", "tactical_directive"]},
    {"id": "kinetic", "label": "KINETIC", "domain": "countermeasures",
     "capabilities": ["alert_dispatch", "failover_hub", "rf_jam_detect", "evac_vector"]},
    {"id": "air_defense", "label": "AIR DEF", "domain": "air_missile_drone_defense",
     "capabilities": ["ads_b", "primary_radar", "gmti", "rf_uas", "eo_ir", "acoustic", "sam_ciws"]},
]


COUNTERMEASURES = {
    "cyber": [
        "Isolate affected subnet via Tailscale ACL",
        "Rotate credentials on compromised service",
        "Deploy bounty dossier hardening playbook",
        "Enable zero_vacuum encrypted alert channel",
    ],
    "sigint": [
        "Increase RTL-SDR dwell on penetration bands",
        "Cross-correlate phonon spikes with RF motion",
        "Activate through-wall WiFi tomography scan",
    ],
    "isr": [
        "Elevate district patrol scan rate to 20Hz",
        "Enable thermal overlay on all viewport buildings",
        "Fuse GMTI tracks with GNSS field nodes",
    ],
    "perimeter": [
        "Verify Tailscale mesh node certificates",
        "Block non-mesh UDP ingress except 2368/2370/2372",
        "Failover GNS hub to penguin-1 standby",
    ],
    "kinetic": [
        "Broadcast evac vector to Pixel mesh nodes",
        "Snapshot lattice OBJ to Synology cold storage",
        "Arm ntfy.sh keith_04901_vault alert",
    ],
    "air_defense": [
        "Fuse ADS-B + primary radar tracks — IFF challenge",
        "C-UAS RF jamming on unauthorized UAS control links",
        "Patriot battery standby — Bangor ANGB intercept ready",
        "NORAD track correlation — Loring early warning sector",
    ],
}

# Area Code 207 — first-response doctrine for Maine disaster scenarios
FIRST_RESPONSE_COUNTERMEASURES = {
    "kennebec_flood": [
        "Activate Kennebec flood plain evac vectors — shelter at Colby College",
        "Deploy Waterville Fire-Rescue water rescue units to river crossings",
        "Isolate Kennebec River substation — reroute via CMP North feeder",
        "Issue boil water advisory via zero_vacuum alert channel",
    ],
    "structure_fire": [
        "Dispatch 3-alarm mutual aid — Winslow + Fairfield engines",
        "Establish triage at MaineGeneral Thayer ER — burn unit standby",
        "ISR thermal sweep downtown for secondary ignition points",
        "Close Common Street perimeter — SIGINT monitor for crowd density",
    ],
    "ice_storm": [
        "Prioritize hospital feeder — life-safety load shedding protocol",
        "Deploy GNSS mesh nodes to track line crew positions",
        "Open public library as warming shelter",
        "Coordinate with CMP for restoration priority list",
    ],
    "power_grid_failure": [
        "Activate MaineGeneral generator fuel resupply — 18h window",
        "Deploy water pump backup at treatment plant",
        "Broadcast power outage map to 207 area mesh nodes",
        "Elevate DEFCON — perimeter lockdown on critical substations",
    ],
    "water_contamination": [
        "Halt Kennebec intake — switch to bottled water distribution",
        "Hospital water reserves — 72h supply audit",
        "Hazmat sampling team to treatment plant",
        "Mass notification — boil water advisory Area Code 207",
    ],
    "hospital_surge": [
        "Activate MEMA mass casualty incident protocol",
        "Deploy surge tents at MaineGeneral Thayer campus",
        "Coordinate air ambulance from Bangor — helipad prep",
        "ISR headcount at triage zones — track patient flow",
    ],
    "school_lockdown": [
        "Winslow & Waterville schools — shelter in place confirmed",
        "Activate City Hall emergency operations center",
        "Law enforcement perimeter — ISR building interior scan",
        "Parent reunification at Colby College shelter",
    ],
    "chemical_spill": [
        "Hazmat plume tracking — downwind shelter in place",
        "Evac 0.5mi radius — Waterville Fire-Rescue lead",
        "Hospital decon lane at MaineGeneral ER",
        "Water intake shutdown — Kennebec River containment booms",
    ],
}


@dataclass
class LayerStatus:
    layer_id: str
    label: str
    active: bool
    quality: float
    source: str
    threat_contrib: float = 0.0
    last_update: float = 0.0
    details: dict = field(default_factory=dict)

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        d = asdict(self)
        d["quality"] = round(d["quality"], 3)
        d["threat_contrib"] = round(d["threat_contrib"], 3)
        return d


@dataclass
class DefensePosture:
    defcon: int
    threat_score: float
    threat_level: str
    active_threats: list[str]
    countermeasures: list[str]
    layers: list[dict]
    tracks_total: int = 0
    humans: int = 0
    animals: int = 0
    cve_alerts: int = 0
    sigint_motion: float = 0.0
    disaster_mode: str = "none"
    disaster_label: str = "Normal Operations"
    disaster_severity: float = 0.0
    response_phase: str = "STANDBY"
    aircraft_tracks: int = 0
    missile_tracks: int = 0
    drone_tracks: int = 0
    hostile_air: int = 0
    air_defense_mode: str = "peacetime"
    timestamp: float = 0.0
    seq: int = 0

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return asdict(self)


class SovereignDefenseCore:
    """Aggregates defense state across all digital twin layers."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._layers: dict[str, LayerStatus] = {}
        self._defcon = Defcon.NORMAL
        self._threats: list[str] = []
        self._seq = 0
        self._cve_count = 0
        self._sigint_motion = 0.0
        self._track_stats = {"total": 0, "humans": 0, "animals": 0}
        self._disaster_mode = "none"
        self._disaster_label = "Normal Operations"
        self._disaster_severity = 0.0
        self._air_stats = {"aircraft": 0, "missile": 0, "drone": 0, "hostile": 0, "mode": "peacetime"}
        self._init_layers()

    def _init_layers(self) -> None:
        now = time.time()
        for layer in DEFENSE_LAYERS:
            self._layers[layer["id"]] = LayerStatus(
                layer_id=layer["id"],
                label=layer["label"],
                active=False,
                quality=0.0,
                source="offline",
                last_update=now,
            )

    def update_layer(
        self,
        layer_id: str,
        *,
        active: bool,
        quality: float,
        source: str,
        threat_contrib: float = 0.0,
        details: dict | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        if layer_id not in self._layers:
            return
        layer = self._layers[layer_id]
        layer.active = active
        layer.quality = max(0.0, min(1.0, quality))
        layer.source = source
        layer.threat_contrib = threat_contrib
        layer.last_update = time.time()
        if details:
            layer.details = details

    def ingest_isr(self, humans: int, animals: int, tracks: int, motion: float) -> None:
        self._track_stats = {"total": tracks, "humans": humans, "animals": animals}
        threat = min(0.4, (humans + animals) * 0.02)
        self.update_layer("isr", active=True, quality=0.6 + motion * 0.35,
                          source="district_capability", threat_contrib=threat,
                          details={"humans": humans, "animals": animals, "tracks": tracks})

    def ingest_sigint(self, motion: float, source: str = "rf_feeder") -> None:
        self._sigint_motion = motion
        self.update_layer("sigint", active=True, quality=0.5 + motion * 0.45,
                          source=source, threat_contrib=min(0.3, motion * 0.25),
                          details={"motion_energy": motion})

    def ingest_cyber(self, cve_alerts: int, latest_cve: str | None = None) -> None:
        self._cve_count = cve_alerts
        threat = min(0.8, cve_alerts * 0.15)
        if cve_alerts > 0:
            self._threats = list(set(self._threats + [f"CVE_ALERT:{latest_cve or 'active'}"]))
        self.update_layer("cyber", active=True, quality=0.7 if cve_alerts == 0 else 0.4,
                          source="04901_sentinel", threat_contrib=threat,
                          details={"cve_alerts": cve_alerts})

    def ingest_nav(self, gns_active: bool, gnss_nodes: int) -> None:
        self.update_layer("nav_c2", active=gns_active, quality=0.85 if gns_active else 0.3,
                          source="gns_bridge", details={"gnss_nodes": gnss_nodes})

    def ingest_spatial(self, spike_count: int, lattice_ok: bool) -> None:
        self.update_layer("spatial", active=lattice_ok, quality=0.6 + min(0.35, spike_count * 0.01),
                          source="04901_digital_twin", details={"spike_count": spike_count})

    def ingest_cognitive(self, ollama_ok: bool) -> None:
        self.update_layer("cognitive", active=ollama_ok, quality=0.8 if ollama_ok else 0.2,
                          source="neural_matrix")

    def ingest_perimeter(self, mesh_nodes: int, expired_nodes: int) -> None:
        threat = min(0.5, expired_nodes * 0.2)
        self.update_layer("perimeter", active=True, quality=0.9 - expired_nodes * 0.15,
                          source="tailscale_mesh", threat_contrib=threat,
                          details={"nodes": mesh_nodes, "expired": expired_nodes})

    def ingest_kinetic(self, alerts_armed: bool) -> None:
        self.update_layer("kinetic", active=alerts_armed, quality=0.75,
                          source="zero_vacuum")

    def ingest_air_defense(
        self,
        aircraft: int,
        missiles: int,
        drones: int,
        hostile: int,
        mode: str,
        severity: float,
        countermeasures: list[str] | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        """Ingest aircraft, missile, and drone detection from air defense engine."""
        self._air_stats = {
            "aircraft": aircraft, "missile": missiles, "drone": drones,
            "hostile": hostile, "mode": mode,
        }
        threat = min(0.95, severity * 0.85 + hostile * 0.12 + missiles * 0.25)
        if hostile > 0:
            self._threats = list(set(self._threats + [f"AIR_THREAT:{mode.upper()}"]))
        if missiles > 0:
            self._threats = list(set(self._threats + ["MISSILE_INBOUND"]))
        if drones > 0 and mode in ("drone_swarm", "loitering_munition", "drone_uas"):
            self._threats = list(set(self._threats + ["UAS_THREAT_ACTIVE"]))
        quality = 0.55 + min(0.4, (aircraft + drones) * 0.03)
        if missiles > 0:
            quality = min(0.99, quality + 0.3)
        self.update_layer(
            "air_defense", active=True, quality=quality,
            source="air_defense_207", threat_contrib=threat,
            details={
                "aircraft": aircraft, "missiles": missiles, "drones": drones,
                "hostile": hostile, "mode": mode,
                "countermeasures": (countermeasures or [])[:4],
            },
        )
        if hostile > 0 or missiles > 0:
            self.update_layer(
                "kinetic", active=True,
                quality=0.6 + min(0.35, threat),
                source="air_defense_kinetic",
                threat_contrib=min(0.4, threat * 0.5),
                details={"intercept_ready": True},
            )

    def ingest_disaster(self, mode: str, label: str, severity: float) -> None:
        """Elevate defense posture from Area Code 207 disaster simulation."""
        self._disaster_mode = mode
        self._disaster_label = label
        self._disaster_severity = severity
        if mode == "none":
            return
        threat = min(0.85, severity * 0.9)
        self._threats = list(set(self._threats + [f"DISASTER:{mode.upper()}"]))
        self.update_layer(
            "kinetic", active=True,
            quality=0.5 + severity * 0.45,
            source="disaster_sim_207",
            threat_contrib=threat * 0.6,
            details={"mode": mode, "severity": severity},
        )
        self.update_layer(
            "nav_c2", active=True,
            quality=0.7 + severity * 0.2,
            source="disaster_c2",
            threat_contrib=threat * 0.2,
            details={"response_active": True},
        )
        self.update_layer(
            "isr", active=True,
            quality=0.65 + severity * 0.25,
            source="disaster_isr",
            threat_contrib=threat * 0.15,
            details={"patrol_priority": "critical_infrastructure"},
        )

    def compute_posture(self) -> DefensePosture:
        now = time.time()
        threat_score = sum(l.threat_contrib for l in self._layers.values())
        threat_score = min(1.0, threat_score)

        if threat_score >= 0.75:
            self._defcon = Defcon.MAXIMUM
            level = "CRITICAL"
        elif threat_score >= 0.55:
            self._defcon = Defcon.HIGH
            level = "HIGH"
        elif threat_score >= 0.35:
            self._defcon = Defcon.ELEVATED
            level = "ELEVATED"
        elif threat_score >= 0.15:
            self._defcon = Defcon.NORMAL
            level = "GUARDED"
        else:
            self._defcon = Defcon.PEACETIME
            level = "LOW"

        countermeasures: list[str] = []
        air_cm = self._layers["air_defense"].details.get("countermeasures", [])
        if air_cm:
            countermeasures.extend(air_cm[:3])
        if self._layers["air_defense"].threat_contrib > 0.2:
            countermeasures.extend(COUNTERMEASURES["air_defense"][:2])
        if self._disaster_mode != "none":
            countermeasures.extend(
                FIRST_RESPONSE_COUNTERMEASURES.get(self._disaster_mode, [])[:4]
            )
        if self._layers["cyber"].threat_contrib > 0.1:
            countermeasures.extend(COUNTERMEASURES["cyber"][:2])
        if self._layers["sigint"].threat_contrib > 0.1:
            countermeasures.extend(COUNTERMEASURES["sigint"][:2])
        if self._layers["isr"].threat_contrib > 0.1:
            countermeasures.extend(COUNTERMEASURES["isr"][:2])
        if self._defcon.value <= 2:
            countermeasures.extend(COUNTERMEASURES["perimeter"][:2])
            countermeasures.extend(COUNTERMEASURES["kinetic"][:2])

        response_phase = "STANDBY"
        if self._disaster_mode != "none":
            if self._disaster_severity >= 0.85:
                response_phase = "MASS_CASUALTY" if self._disaster_mode == "hospital_surge" else "EMERGENCY"
            elif self._disaster_severity >= 0.6:
                response_phase = "ACTIVE_RESPONSE"
            else:
                response_phase = "MONITORING"

        self._seq += 1
        return DefensePosture(
            defcon=self._defcon.value,
            threat_score=round(threat_score, 3),
            threat_level=level,
            active_threats=self._threats[-8:],
            countermeasures=countermeasures[:8],
            layers=[l.to_dict() for l in self._layers.values()],
            tracks_total=self._track_stats["total"],
            humans=self._track_stats["humans"],
            animals=self._track_stats["animals"],
            cve_alerts=self._cve_count,
            sigint_motion=round(self._sigint_motion, 3),
            disaster_mode=self._disaster_mode,
            disaster_label=self._disaster_label,
            disaster_severity=round(self._disaster_severity, 3),
            response_phase=response_phase,
            aircraft_tracks=self._air_stats["aircraft"],
            missile_tracks=self._air_stats["missile"],
            drone_tracks=self._air_stats["drone"],
            hostile_air=self._air_stats["hostile"],
            air_defense_mode=self._air_stats["mode"],
            timestamp=now,
            seq=self._seq,
        )

    def publish_bus(self, posture: DefensePosture | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """Write defense state to shared memory bus for Godot/Aether layers."""
        payload = (posture or self.compute_posture()).to_dict()
        payload["type"] = "defense_posture"
        payload["layers_registry"] = DEFENSE_LAYERS
        try:
            SHM_BUS.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2))
        except OSError:
            pass
        return payload

    def ws_message(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        p = self.compute_posture()
        msg = p.to_dict()
        msg["type"] = "defense_posture"
        msg["layers_registry"] = DEFENSE_LAYERS
        self.publish_bus(p)
        return msg

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Area Code 207 — Air Defense Systems Engine.
Aircraft, missile, and drone detection via ADS-B, primary radar, GMTI, RF UAS, EO/IR, acoustic.

Keith Alan Dickey — WSDS / 04901 Studio
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import math
import time
from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict, field
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

CONFIG = Path(__file__).resolve().parent / "config" / "air_defense_207.json"

ANCHOR_LAT = 44.5520
ANCHOR_LON = -69.6317
EARTH_RADIUS_M = 6_371_000.0

TRACK_COLORS = {
    "aircraft_friendly": "#44aaff",
    "aircraft_unknown": "#ffcc00",
    "aircraft_hostile": "#ff2244",
    "missile_ballistic": "#ff00ff",
    "missile_cruise": "#ff6600",
    "drone_uas": "#ffaa00",
    "drone_loitering": "#ff4466",
    "drone_swarm": "#ff8800",
}

AIR_DEFENSE_COUNTERMEASURES = {
    "aircraft_hostile": [
        "Scramble Maine ANG F-15C from Barnes ANGB — intercept vector",
        "Activate IFF challenge on Bangor AN/TPS-75 track",
        "Broadcast TFR over Kennebec Valley — civilian traffic divert",
        "Arm Patriot battery — weapons free on confirmed hostile",
    ],
    "missile_ballistic": [
        "BALLISTIC THREAT — elevate DEFCON 1, NORAD notification",
        "Patriot PAC-3 launch sequence — Bangor battery",
        "Civil defense alert — Area Code 207 mass notification",
        "Evacuate critical infrastructure — MaineGeneral priority",
    ],
    "missile_cruise": [
        "Cruise missile track — Patriot intercept window 4min",
        "Coastal radar fuse with Loring early warning sector",
        "Smoke/obscurant deploy on critical nodes",
        "ISR GMTI confirm low-altitude ingress vector",
    ],
    "drone_swarm": [
        "C-UAS RF jamming — Kennebec mesh nodes active",
        "Waterville CIWS counter-UAS — kinetic intercept authorized",
        "Acoustic triangulation — swarm centroid tracking",
        "Protect MaineGeneral air corridor — no-fly enforcement",
    ],
    "drone_loitering": [
        "Loitering munition detected — immediate kinetic response",
        "RF control link geolocation via SIGINT mesh",
        "EO/IR confirm thermal signature — strike package",
        "Evac 1km radius from track centroid",
    ],
    "drone_uas": [
        "Unauthorized UAS — RF fingerprint and track",
        "C-UAS node Waterville Armory — soft-kill jamming",
        "Notify MEMA and local law enforcement",
        "Fuse ADS-B absence with RF detect — classify threat",
    ],
}


def latlon_offset(lat: float, lon: float, dx_km: float, dy_km: float) -> tuple[float, float]:
    dlat = (dy_km * 1000) / EARTH_RADIUS_M * (180 / math.pi)
    dlon = (dx_km * 1000) / (EARTH_RADIUS_M * math.cos(math.radians(lat))) * (180 / math.pi)
    return lat + dlat, lon + dlon


def haversine_km(lat1: float, lon1: float, lat2: float, lon2: float) -> float:
    rlat1, rlon1, rlat2, rlon2 = map(math.radians, [lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2])
    dlat = rlat2 - rlat1
    dlon = rlon2 - rlon1
    a = math.sin(dlat / 2) ** 2 + math.cos(rlat1) * math.cos(rlat2) * math.sin(dlon / 2) ** 2
    return 2 * EARTH_RADIUS_M * math.asin(math.sqrt(a)) / 1000


@dataclass
class AirTrack:
    track_id: str
    entity_class: str
    entity_type: str
    affiliation: str
    lat: float
    lon: float
    alt_m: float
    speed_mps: float
    heading_deg: float
    threat_level: str
    confidence: float
    detected_by: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    sensors: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    callsign: str = ""
    notes: str = ""

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        d = asdict(self)
        d["lat"] = round(d["lat"], 6)
        d["lon"] = round(d["lon"], 6)
        d["alt_m"] = round(d["alt_m"], 1)
        d["speed_mps"] = round(d["speed_mps"], 1)
        d["heading_deg"] = round(d["heading_deg"], 1)
        d["confidence"] = round(d["confidence"], 3)
        d["color"] = TRACK_COLORS.get(f"{self.entity_class}_{self.affiliation}", TRACK_COLORS.get(self.entity_class, "#ffcc00"))
        return d


@dataclass
class AirDefenseState:
    mode: str
    label: str
    severity: float
    phase: float
    seq: int
    timestamp: float
    systems: list[dict]
    tracks: list[dict]
    alerts: list[str]
    modalities: dict
    aircraft_count: int = 0
    missile_count: int = 0
    drone_count: int = 0
    hostile_count: int = 0
    countermeasures: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return asdict(self)


class AirDefenseRegistry:
    def __init__(self, path: Path = CONFIG):
        with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
            data = json.load(f)
        self.area_code = data.get("area_code", "207")
        self.modalities = data.get("detection_modalities", {})
        self.systems = data.get("systems", [])
        self.threat_modes = {m["id"]: m for m in data.get("air_threat_modes", [])}

    def systems_in_range(self, lat: float, lon: float) -> list[dict]:
        visible = []
        for sys in self.systems:
            dist = haversine_km(lat, lon, sys["lat"], sys["lon"])
            if dist <= sys.get("range_km", 50):
                visible.append({**sys, "distance_km": round(dist, 2)})
        return visible


class AirDefenseSimulator:
    """Simulates Maine airspace tracks and multi-sensor detection."""

    def __init__(self):
        self.registry = AirDefenseRegistry()
        self._mode = "peacetime"
        self._phase = 0.0
        self._seq = 0
        self._start = time.time()
        self._tracks: dict[str, dict] = {}
        self._init_peacetime_tracks()

    @property
    def mode(self) -> str:
        return self._mode

    def set_mode(self, mode: str) -> bool:
        if mode not in self.registry.threat_modes:
            return False
        self._mode = mode
        self._phase = 0.0
        self._start = time.time()
        self._tracks.clear()
        if mode == "peacetime":
            self._init_peacetime_tracks()
        elif mode == "disaster_medevac":
            self._init_medevac_tracks()
        else:
            self._inject_threat_tracks(mode)
        return True

    def _init_peacetime_tracks(self) -> None:
        self._tracks = {
            "ANG001": {
                "track_id": "ANG001", "entity_class": "aircraft", "entity_type": "fixed_wing",
                "affiliation": "friendly", "callsign": "MAINE01",
                "lat": 44.78, "lon": -68.85, "alt_m": 4500, "speed_mps": 130,
                "heading_deg": 210, "orbit_center": (44.80, -68.83), "orbit_r_km": 15,
            },
            "CIV102": {
                "track_id": "CIV102", "entity_class": "aircraft", "entity_type": "fixed_wing",
                "affiliation": "friendly", "callsign": "PWM→BGR",
                "lat": 44.10, "lon": -69.50, "alt_m": 2800, "speed_mps": 85,
                "heading_deg": 45, "route": [(44.10, -69.50), (44.55, -69.63), (44.81, -68.83)],
                "route_idx": 0,
            },
            "LIFEFLIGHT1": {
                "track_id": "LIFEFLIGHT1", "entity_class": "aircraft", "entity_type": "rotary",
                "affiliation": "friendly", "callsign": "LF207",
                "lat": 44.556, "lon": -69.636, "alt_m": 300, "speed_mps": 45,
                "heading_deg": 90, "hover": True,
            },
        }

    def _init_medevac_tracks(self) -> None:
        self._init_peacetime_tracks()
        self._tracks["MEDEVAC2"] = {
            "track_id": "MEDEVAC2", "entity_class": "aircraft", "entity_type": "rotary",
            "affiliation": "friendly", "callsign": "MEDEVAC2",
            "lat": 44.60, "lon": -69.70, "alt_m": 500, "speed_mps": 55,
            "heading_deg": 135, "route": [(44.60, -69.70), (44.556, -69.636)],
            "route_idx": 0,
        }

    def _inject_threat_tracks(self, mode: str) -> None:
        self._init_peacetime_tracks()
        if mode == "hostile_aircraft":
            self._tracks["HOSTILE01"] = {
                "track_id": "HOSTILE01", "entity_class": "aircraft", "entity_type": "fighter",
                "affiliation": "hostile", "callsign": "UNKNOWN",
                "lat": 45.20, "lon": -70.50, "alt_m": 8000, "speed_mps": 250,
                "heading_deg": 60, "route": [(45.20, -70.50), (44.55, -69.63)],
                "route_idx": 0,
            }
        elif mode == "cruise_missile":
            self._tracks["CM001"] = {
                "track_id": "CM001", "entity_class": "missile_cruise", "entity_type": "cruise",
                "affiliation": "hostile", "callsign": "",
                "lat": 43.50, "lon": -70.80, "alt_m": 80, "speed_mps": 280,
                "heading_deg": 25, "route": [(43.50, -70.80), (44.55, -69.63)],
                "route_idx": 0,
            }
        elif mode == "ballistic_threat":
            self._tracks["BM001"] = {
                "track_id": "BM001", "entity_class": "missile_ballistic", "entity_type": "ballistic",
                "affiliation": "hostile", "callsign": "",
                "lat": 46.50, "lon": -72.00, "alt_m": 120000, "speed_mps": 2000,
                "heading_deg": 90, "route": [(46.50, -72.00), (44.55, -69.63)],
                "route_idx": 0, "descent": True,
            }
        elif mode == "drone_swarm":
            for i in range(6):
                angle = i * (360 / 6)
                dx = 3 * math.cos(math.radians(angle))
                dy = 3 * math.sin(math.radians(angle))
                lat, lon = latlon_offset(ANCHOR_LAT, ANCHOR_LON, dx, dy)
                self._tracks[f"UAS{i:02d}"] = {
                    "track_id": f"UAS{i:02d}", "entity_class": "drone_swarm", "entity_type": "quadcopter",
                    "affiliation": "hostile", "callsign": "",
                    "lat": lat, "lon": lon, "alt_m": 120 + i * 10, "speed_mps": 12,
                    "heading_deg": (angle + 180) % 360,
                    "orbit_center": (ANCHOR_LAT, ANCHOR_LON), "orbit_r_km": 3,
                }
        elif mode == "loitering_munition":
            self._tracks["LM001"] = {
                "track_id": "LM001", "entity_class": "drone_loitering", "entity_type": "loitering_munition",
                "affiliation": "hostile", "callsign": "",
                "lat": 44.58, "lon": -69.65, "alt_m": 400, "speed_mps": 35,
                "heading_deg": 270, "loiter": True,
                "loiter_center": (44.556, -69.636), "loiter_r_km": 2,
            }
        elif mode == "drone_uas":
            self._tracks["UAS01"] = {
                "track_id": "UAS01", "entity_class": "drone_uas", "entity_type": "fixed_wing_uas",
                "affiliation": "unknown", "callsign": "",
                "lat": 44.54, "lon": -69.62, "alt_m": 200, "speed_mps": 18,
                "heading_deg": 180, "route": [(44.54, -69.62), (44.56, -69.64), (44.55, -69.63)],
                "route_idx": 0,
            }

    def _advance_track(self, t: dict, phase: float) -> None:
        if t.get("hover"):
            t["heading_deg"] = (t["heading_deg"] + 2) % 360
            return
        if t.get("loiter"):
            cx, cy = t["loiter_center"]
            angle = phase * 2 * math.pi
            r = t.get("loiter_r_km", 2)
            t["lat"], t["lon"] = latlon_offset(cx, cy, r * math.cos(angle), r * math.sin(angle))
            t["heading_deg"] = math.degrees(angle + math.pi / 2) % 360
            return
        if "orbit_center" in t:
            cx, cy = t["orbit_center"]
            angle = phase * 2 * math.pi
            r = t.get("orbit_r_km", 10)
            t["lat"], t["lon"] = latlon_offset(cx, cy, r * math.cos(angle), r * math.sin(angle))
            t["heading_deg"] = math.degrees(angle + math.pi / 2) % 360
            return
        if "route" in t:
            route = t["route"]
            idx = t.get("route_idx", 0)
            target = route[min(idx + 1, len(route) - 1)]
            cur_lat, cur_lon = t["lat"], t["lon"]
            dlat = target[0] - cur_lat
            dlon = target[1] - cur_lon
            dist_deg = math.sqrt(dlat ** 2 + dlon ** 2)
            if dist_deg < 0.005 and idx < len(route) - 2:
                t["route_idx"] = idx + 1
                return
            step = (t["speed_mps"] / 111000) * 0.5
            if dist_deg > 0:
                t["lat"] += (dlat / dist_deg) * step
                t["lon"] += (dlon / dist_deg) * step
                t["heading_deg"] = math.degrees(math.atan2(dlon, dlat)) % 360
            if t.get("descent"):
                t["alt_m"] = max(500, t["alt_m"] - 800 * 0.5)
            return

    def _detect_track(self, t: dict) -> tuple[list[str], list[str], float, str]:
        sensors: list[str] = []
        modalities: list[str] = []
        lat, lon = t["lat"], t["lon"]
        entity = t["entity_class"]
        affiliation = t["affiliation"]

        for sys in self.registry.systems:
            dist = haversine_km(lat, lon, sys["lat"], sys["lon"])
            if dist > sys.get("range_km", 50):
                continue
            for cap in sys.get("capabilities", []):
                mod = self.registry.modalities.get(cap, {})
                detects = mod.get("detects", [])
                class_match = (
                    entity.startswith("aircraft") and "aircraft" in detects
                    or entity.startswith("missile") and "missile" in detects
                    or entity.startswith("drone") and "drone" in detects
                )
                if class_match or entity.split("_")[0] in detects:
                    sensors.append(sys["id"])
                    modalities.append(cap)

        confidence = 0.4 + 0.1 * len(set(modalities))
        if "ads_b" in modalities and t["entity_class"] == "aircraft":
            confidence = min(0.98, confidence + 0.35)
        if affiliation == "friendly":
            confidence = min(0.99, confidence + 0.2)

        if affiliation == "hostile":
            threat = "critical"
        elif affiliation == "unknown":
            threat = "elevated"
        elif entity.startswith("missile"):
            threat = "critical"
        elif entity.startswith("drone"):
            threat = "high" if affiliation != "friendly" else "low"
        else:
            threat = "low"

        return list(set(sensors)), list(set(modalities)), min(0.99, confidence), threat

    def tick(self) -> AirDefenseState:
        self._phase = (time.time() - self._start) % 120 / 120.0
        self._seq += 1
        mode_meta = self.registry.threat_modes.get(self._mode, {"label": self._mode, "severity": 0})

        for t in self._tracks.values():
            self._advance_track(t, self._phase)

        tracks: list[AirTrack] = []
        alerts: list[str] = []
        aircraft = missile = drone = hostile = 0

        for t in self._tracks.values():
            sensors, modalities, confidence, threat = self._detect_track(t)
            if not sensors and self._mode == "peacetime":
                continue
            if not sensors:
                confidence *= 0.5

            track = AirTrack(
                track_id=t["track_id"],
                entity_class=t["entity_class"],
                entity_type=t["entity_type"],
                affiliation=t["affiliation"],
                lat=t["lat"], lon=t["lon"],
                alt_m=t["alt_m"],
                speed_mps=t["speed_mps"],
                heading_deg=t["heading_deg"],
                threat_level=threat,
                confidence=confidence,
                detected_by=sensors,
                sensors=modalities,
                callsign=t.get("callsign", ""),
                notes=self._track_notes(t),
            )
            tracks.append(track)

            if t["entity_class"] == "aircraft" or t["entity_class"].startswith("aircraft"):
                aircraft += 1
            elif "missile" in t["entity_class"]:
                missile += 1
            elif "drone" in t["entity_class"]:
                drone += 1
            if t["affiliation"] == "hostile":
                hostile += 1

        countermeasures: list[str] = []
        if hostile > 0 or missile > 0:
            for t in tracks:
                key = t.entity_class if t.affiliation == "hostile" else f"{t.entity_class.split('_')[0]}_{t.affiliation}"
                if t.affiliation == "hostile" or t.threat_level in ("critical", "high"):
                    cm_key = t.entity_class
                    if cm_key in AIR_DEFENSE_COUNTERMEASURES:
                        countermeasures.extend(AIR_DEFENSE_COUNTERMEASURES[cm_key][:2])

        if hostile > 0:
            alerts.append(f"HOSTILE TRACK — {hostile} threat(s) in 207 airspace")
        if missile > 0:
            alerts.append(f"MISSILE TRACK — {missile} inbound threat(s) DETECTED")
        if drone > 0 and self._mode in ("drone_swarm", "loitering_munition", "drone_uas"):
            alerts.append(f"UAS THREAT — {drone} drone(s) — C-UAS response active")
        if self._mode == "peacetime" and not alerts:
            alerts.append("Area Code 207 airspace — all tracks nominal")

        systems_out = []
        for sys in self.registry.systems:
            systems_out.append({
                **sys,
                "status": "online",
                "tracks_held": sum(1 for tr in tracks if sys["id"] in tr.detected_by),
            })

        return AirDefenseState(
            mode=self._mode,
            label=mode_meta.get("label", self._mode),
            severity=float(mode_meta.get("severity", 0)),
            phase=round(self._phase, 3),
            seq=self._seq,
            timestamp=time.time(),
            systems=systems_out,
            tracks=[tr.to_dict() for tr in tracks],
            alerts=alerts,
            modalities=self.registry.modalities,
            aircraft_count=aircraft,
            missile_count=missile,
            drone_count=drone,
            hostile_count=hostile,
            countermeasures=list(dict.fromkeys(countermeasures))[:6],
        )

    def _track_notes(self, t: dict) -> str:
        if t["affiliation"] == "hostile":
            return f"HOSTILE — {t['entity_type']} — weapons free advisory"
        if t["entity_class"].startswith("missile"):
            return "Inbound threat — Patriot intercept window active"
        if t["entity_class"].startswith("drone"):
            return "UAS detected — RF/acoustic fusion"
        return f"{t.get('callsign', 'TRACK')} — ADS-B/radar confirmed"

    def ws_message(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        state = self.tick()
        d = state.to_dict()
        d["type"] = "air_defense"
        d["area_code"] = self.registry.area_code
        d["threat_modes"] = list(self.registry.threat_modes.values())
        return d

|---|---|

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `defense_core.py` | DEFCON / posture core |
| `air_defense.py` | Air defense simulation |
| `defense_bus.py` | Mesh bus integration |

```bash
cd ~/projects/sovereign-defense
python3 defense_core.py
# Full stack UI:
bash ~/projects/sovereign-engine/start-earth.sh
# → http://localhost:5173
```
